text: The department may spend money from any source for the construction, maintenance, and operation of toll facilities.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 222. Funding & Fed. Aid
##### § 222.101 — Expenditure of Money

The department may spend money from any source for the construction, maintenance, and operation of toll facilities.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1171, Sec. 7.01, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: The department may spend money from any source for the construction, maintenance, and operation of toll facilities.
